tuning: E A D G B E
content:
I don't see why the other versions are wrong easiest chords to tab


[tab]         [ch]Cm[/ch]              [ch]Ab[/ch]
I'm not afraid to take a stand[/tab]

[tab]     [ch]Eb[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]    
Everybody come take my hand[/tab]

[tab]                     [ch]Cm[/ch]
We'll walk this road together, through the storm[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]Ab[/ch]
Whatever weather, cold or warm[/tab]

[tab]             [ch]Eb[/ch]
Just let you know that, you're not alone[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
Holla if you feel that you've been down the same road[/tab]


Same chords are used for:
In My Head     -   Jason Derulo
Break Your Heart - Taio Cruz
Apologize     -    Onerepublic

ta-da
